title: lycopodium obtusifolium
intro: Lycopodium obtusifolium, also known as the box fern or club moss, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the club moss family (Lycopodiaceae). Traditionally, the roots of Lycopodium obtusifolium have been used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to treat various skin conditions. Lycopodium obtusifolium can be prepared in herbal remedies such as tinctures, infusions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
